content.en:
Although Ye Tian didn't know what the limit of Senior Sister Xuenu's strength was, he was definitely very close to the Ten Realm-level controllers, and even if his combat power was fully exploded, with the help of the two Ten Thousand Phase Statues and the Will Blade Knife, he could only barely reach the threshold of the combat power of the Nine Realm-level controllers.

As a result, the Snow Maiden Controller can easily defeat him.

"Little junior brother, I'm afraid you came to me this time for something, right?" asked the Snow Maiden.

Ye Tian nodded: "Fourth Senior Sister, I have already condensed the Will Transformation Realm, and my physical body has also reached the primordial level control body, and I have mastered a lot of top-level origin control skills, and my strength is getting closer and closer to the limit." Even if he cultivated for endless years, he relied on accumulation to step into the realm of the Nine Realms level controller, and it seemed that there was no way to continue to improve. I want to ask the fourth senior sister, how to go next?"

The Snow Maiden said: "Little junior brother, you are also qualified to know now, the reason why I didn't tell you, and the master didn't say it, is because it is not beneficial to know in advance, and it will even affect your future path." For example, in the Origin Realm Sea right now, there are some Eight Realm-level Masters or Nine-Realm Level Controllers who have just taken the wrong path, and they will never have any hope of being promoted to the Ten Realm-level Masters, let alone surpassing the Ten Realms. If you come into contact with some Nine Realm-level controllers, you will find that they don't have the body of primordial-level control, nor do they have the Will Transformation Realm, but their strength has reached the Nine Realms-level masters, do you think it's really relying on the accumulation of countless years?"

"There are also Nine Realm-level masters who haven't mastered the Will-incarnation Realm or the primordial-level control body?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Naturally, there is!" said the Snow Maiden Controller, "and there are quite a few, in fact, many Eternal Masters know that they should not go the wrong way, but the rapid increase in strength will make them unable to control themselves." Many geniuses with talents no less than mine, and they were scrapped like this. Although the other party has now reached the Nine Realms level master, it is only the weakest Nine Realms level controller, and there is no hope of becoming the Ten Realms level. Moreover, there is one who has taken the wrong path, and you know it. "

"Who?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Senior brother!" said the Snow Maiden controller: "Senior Brother took the wrong path, Shizun didn't expect it, Senior Brother's talent is worse than us, his strength is too slow to improve, plus Shizun got up early to give too much help, he can't quickly improve his strength, after knowing some secrets, he can't help it." Now, Senior Brother has been trapped in the Nine Realms level controller, and he will never be able to step into the Ten Realms level controller. As a result, you find that the senior brother also has a salted fish attitude, and he starts to enjoy the fun and doesn't practice much. Of course, the senior brother still has a good mentality and doesn't think too much. "

"Fourth Senior Sister, just say it quickly, I'm getting more and more curious. "

Ye Tian said.

The Snow Maiden controller didn't beat around the bush anymore, and said directly: "Generally, at the level of junior brother, you have condensed the volitional form realm and primordial-level control body, and created a lot of top-notch origin control skills, which seems to have reached the limit. At this time, there are only two ways to continue to improve your strength quickly. The first path is to take the path of self-creation, and the junior disciple should be no stranger to this, because in our past practice, we don't know how many paths we have created, but many of them are small paths, and our potential is limited, so we will abandon them later. After creating the Dao, combined with the changes of other Dao, let your Dao continue to change, and after mastering hundreds of millions of changes, you can hook up the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and let your own Dao become a kind of origin of the Origin Realm Sea. The Origin Realm Sea is now not just the origin of the three thousand realms, but many, many more. Once this is achieved, the Eternal Masterer will be able to use the Origin Energy of the Origin Realm Sea to refine his body at all times. "

At this time, a black hole appeared behind the Snow Maiden, and countless origin energy poured into her body.

"This is the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, although I can extract very few origins, but it is better to last, and I can make my physical body stronger and stronger. But if you don't do it until you have formed a primordial mastery body, you must not do it, otherwise you will hardly be able to form a primordial mastery body in the future. Snow Maiden said.

Ye Tian nodded, he didn't need to worry, because he had already condensed the primordial-level control body.

Then, the Snow Maiden controller said the second path: "The second path has the greatest improvement, and that is to open up a boundary river, but without the ultimate control strength of the Nine Realms, don't try to do it." Once a boundary river is opened, it can accommodate the power of a boundary river to break the limit, not only the physical limit, but also the limit of the power of control, and even make the will skyrocket. For example, although you have reached the volitional form, after reaching this realm, the willpower can still continue to improve, but it is difficult to do it, and when you open up the boundary river, you can break this limit and reach the true extreme of the will of the incarnation realm. "

"Fourth Senior Sister, are you saying that the Boundary River was opened up?" Ye Tian was shocked.

He had always thought that the Boundary River was born naturally, but now he was told that the Boundary River was actually carved out.

"Yes, it's all carved out!"

The Snow Maiden Controller replied.

Ye Tian said again: "Fourth Senior Sister, there are a total of eighty-eight boundary rivers, doesn't it mean that there are a total of eighty-eight Nine Realms Extreme Masters to attack the Ten Realm-level Controllers, then there are eighty-eight Ten-Realm Controllers?"

"Yes, that's true, but a lot has fallen. The Snow Maiden said, "Based on my information, there are only forty-nine Ten Realm-level controllers who are still alive. "

"Fourth Senior Sister, who opened up the No. 13 Boundary River where I am located?" Ye Tian asked.

The Snow Maiden pondered for a moment and said, "The Thirteenth Boundary River, I think about it, seems to have been established by the Demon Prison Master, but this one has fallen, he used to fight with Shizun, but unfortunately he offended another great existence and was killed. "

"So, is Senior Sister going to open up the Boundary River too?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Xue Nu smiled and said: "You are inquiring about my strength, but it doesn't hurt to tell you, it won't be long before I will also open up the Boundary River, if it is successful, I will be the Ten Realms level controller." But once you fail, you will never be able to enter the Ten Realms level. There is only one chance to open up the boundary river. But once the boundary river is opened, the strength will increase by leaps and bounds in a short period of time, and many eternal masters will want to open it up, but if they force it to open up because of their lack of strength, they will completely fail. Many Eternal Masters have not made progress for countless years, so they can't bear it, and they want to try their luck, although there are successful particles, but nine out of nine fail!"

"Fourth Senior Sister, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.
